overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a sci-fi character in a spacesuit exploring a dark industrial facility. The character descends metal walkways, passes through an airlock into a red-lit server room, investigates a control room with a dead body, and interacts with server racks. High-quality game engine rendering with atmospheric lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking down metal stairs and grated platforms toward the B1 bulkhead door

entered.detail: metal grate flooring with industrial texture
metal safety railings lining the walkway
heavy industrial door marked with B1 identifier
yellow and black hazard stripes on pillars

segments.scene_description: The character descends a metal grated walkway in a dimly lit industrial facility. Yellow and black warning stripes mark the pillars as the character approaches the B1 bulkhead door at the bottom of the stairs.

events.description: enters yellow-lit airlock corridor from the dark teal walkway
passes through into the red-lit server room with rack-lined corridors

agents.ego_description: passing through the airlock and entering the server room facility

entered.detail: narrow passage with yellow emergency lighting
strip lighting along the corridor walls
tall server cabinets with blinking lights
red warning lights illuminating the server room

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a yellow-lit airlock corridor and transitions into a server room bathed in red emergency lighting. Server racks become visible in the distance as the lighting shifts dramatically from yellow to red.

scene_state.functional_zone: server rack corridor with emergency lighting

events.description: character removes helmet and crouches down to rest
character stands up and replaces the helmet

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow server corridor, removing helmet to breathe, then putting it back on before continuing

entered.detail: large circular vault door at the end of the corridor
small utility table against the server racks

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a narrow corridor flanked by server racks glowing with red indicator lights. The character pauses to remove their helmet, revealing their face, before putting it back on and approaching a large vault door at the end of the hall.

events.description: discovers blood pool and severed hand on the floor
picks up an item from the blood pool

agents.ego_description: investigating the control room, collecting evidence from the blood, and accessing the computer system

entered.detail: retro-style computer with CRT monitor and keyboard
large pool of blood on the metal floor
human hand lying in the blood

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small control room with amber lighting and discovers a gruesome scene—a pool of blood with a severed hand. The character picks up an item from the blood and interacts with a computer terminal displaying red text on the screen.

events.description: interacts with server rack unit 5, pulling out a data module
interacts with second server rack to extract another component

agents.ego_description: returning to the server corridor and extracting data modules from multiple server rack units

entered.detail: digital readout showing server status information
large ventilation fans on the server units

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the red-lit server corridor and systematically interacts with multiple server racks, pulling out data modules from the units. The environment is filled with the glow of red indicator lights and the hum of cooling fans.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial facility that transitions from cold metallic walkways into a claustrophobic, red-lit server complex. It begins as the character descends a metal grated walkway marked by yellow and black warning stripes, moving toward a bulkhead door at the base of the stairs. As the character passes through a yellow-lit airlock, the environment shifts dramatically into a server room bathed in red emergency lighting, where the camera follows them through a narrow corridor of glowing racks before they briefly remove their helmet. The scene then opens into a small control room with amber lighting, revealing a pool of blood and a severed hand, before the character interacts with a terminal displaying red text. Finally, the camera retreats back into the red-lit corridor as the character systematically pulls data modules from the humming server racks.
